title: Create: Numismatics Utils
description: Utilities for Create: Numismatics! Display Account Balance on your HUD with the Bank Meter and remotely access your account with the Portable Bank Terminal
body:
# Create: Numismatics Utils

This mod is an addon mod for [Create: Numismatics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/numismatics) that adds a few QOL items and features for bank accounts.

# Features

## Bank Meter

Display your bank account balance in the top right of your screen! Place the meter in the provided curio slot and it will update as your balance does.

## Portable Bank Terminal

Tired of running to your Bank Terminal for quick cash? This is a portable version that allows you to remotely access your account from anywhere to deposit or withdraw currency.

## Better shared bank account handling

Sharing a bank account with your friend in multiplayer? Place a linked Card in the Card curio slot to have the Bank Meter, Bank Terminal and Portable Bank Terminal use your shared account automatically!

# Dependencies

## Required

*   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - 6.0.6
*   [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics) - 1.0.15
*   [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - 5.14.1

## Support

Questions? Comments? Suggestions? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/GdcZkrZqkj)!

## Credits
